notes: Made revision notes visible in Update window.
Release notes now shown on Updates screen
Improved DRIP test toggle and leak state clearing
Fixed beverage delete to show name instead of UUID; BatchFlow cleanup on delete
Improved connection stability; BatchFlow card display improvements
Fixed RELOAD button to bypass browser cache
Fixed weight units (kg/lb) in keg form
Fixed imperial/metric unit switching for all volume displays
Renamed report labels to Scheduled/Conditional Notifications
Added leak event count to scheduled notification reports
Added DRIP test button for leak detection testing
Added leak/drip detection with conditional notification
Allow manual K-factor entry on calibration screen
Updated notification emails; KegLevel Brain rename; default K-factor 2900
WiFi reset escape hatch during provisioning
Renamed WiFi Mode to Network Mode
